mapper.select:
/* IFacilityInfoMapper.selectFacilityInfoList */ SELECT ac.apt_cmplex_no aptCmplexNo /* 단지번호 */ , ac.apt_cmplex_nm aptCmplexNm /* 단지명 */ , ac.sido_nm sidoNm /* 시도명 */ , ac.sigungu_nm sigunguNm /* 시군구명 */ , ac.emd_nm emdNm /* 읍면동명 */ , ac.dorojuso dorojuso /* 도로명주소 */ , ac.heat_ty heatTy /* 난방방식 */ , ac.cnsco_nm cnscoNm /* 시공사명 */ , ac.unit_cnt unitCnt /* 세대수 */ , ac.dong_cnt dongCnt /* 동수 */ , ac.pkg_cnt pkgCnt /* 주차가능대수 */ , ac.free_pkg_cnt freePkgCnt /* 세대당 무료주차 */ , ac.max_floor maxFloor /* 최대층수 */ , ac.cc_cnt ccCnt /* CCTV 수 */ , ac.bld_yr bldYr /* 준공년도 */
, f.facility_no facilityNo /* 시설번호 */ , f.facility_nm facilityNm /* 시설명 */
, f.dong_no dongNo /* 시설 위치 동번호 */ , f.loc_cn locCn /* 시설위치 */ , f.use_yn useYn /* 사용여부 */ , CASE f.facility_ty_cd WHEN 'ELV' THEN '승강기' WHEN 'WTR' THEN '급수시설' WHEN 'ELC' THEN '전기시설' WHEN 'GAS' THEN '가스시설' WHEN 'FIRE' THEN '소방시설' WHEN 'SEC' THEN '보안시설' WHEN 'ETC' THEN '기타시설' WHEN 'PARK' THEN '입주민주차장' WHEN 'PLAY' THEN '놀이시설' WHEN 'COMM' THEN '커뮤니티룸' WHEN 'GYM' THEN '피트니스센터' WHEN 'STUDY' THEN '작은도서관' WHEN 'PARKING' THEN '방문차량 주차구역' WHEN 'MEET' THEN '회의실' ELSE f.facility_ty_cd END facilityTyCd /* 시설유형명 */ , pf.cmn_facility_no cmnFacilityNo /* 공용시설번호 */ , pf.cmn_facility_nm cmnFacilityNm /* 공용시설명 */ , pf.cmn_facility_cn cmnFacilityCn /* 공용시설설명 */ , pf.cmn_facility_amt cmnFacilityAmt /* 이용금액 */ , pf.cmn_facility_rsv_yn cmnFacilityRsvYn /* 예약가능여부 */ , pf.cmn_facility_opr_hr cmnFacilityOprHr /* 운영시간 */
, ( SELECT LISTAGG(pp.biz_ty_nm || '(' || pp.partner_nm || ')', ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY pp.biz_ty_nm, pp.partner_nm) FROM partner pp WHERE pp.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no AND NVL(pp.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' ) partnerList /* 협력업체 목록 */
, ( SELECT LISTAGG(aa.infra_nm, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY aa.infra_nm) FROM apt_infra aa WHERE aa.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no AND aa.category_cd = 'EDUCATION' ) educationInfra /* 교육시설 */
, ( SELECT LISTAGG( CASE WHEN aa.category_cd = 'TRANSIT_LINES' THEN '지하철 ' || aa.infra_nm WHEN aa.category_cd = 'TRANSIT_ACCESS' THEN '도보 ' || aa.infra_nm END , ', ' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY CASE WHEN aa.category_cd = 'TRANSIT_LINES' THEN 1 WHEN aa.category_cd = 'TRANSIT_ACCESS' THEN 2 END , aa.infra_nm ) FROM apt_infra aa WHERE aa.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no AND aa.category_cd IN ('TRANSIT_LINES', 'TRANSIT_ACCESS') ) transitInfo /* 교통정보 */
, ( SELECT LISTAGG(aa.infra_nm, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY aa.infra_nm) FROM apt_infra aa WHERE aa.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no AND aa.category_cd = 'WELFARE' ) welfareInfra /* 복지시설 */
, ( SELECT LISTAGG(aa.infra_nm, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY aa.infra_nm) FROM apt_infra aa WHERE aa.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no AND aa.category_cd = 'CONVENIENCE' ) convenienceInfra /* 생활편의시설 */ /* 주변 인프라 목록 */ /* 주변 인프라 목록 */
, pi.cmn_facility_item_no cmnFacilityItemNo /* 공용시설 물품번호 */ , pi.item_nm itemNm /* 물품명 */ , pi.cmn_facility_stts_cd cmnFacilitySttsCd /* 물품상태코드 */ /* 공용시설 물품 목록 */
FROM apt_complex ac
LEFT JOIN facility f ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no AND NVL(f.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN public_facility pf ON f.facility_no = pf.facility_no AND ac.apt_cmplex_no = pf.apt_cmplex_no
LEFT JOIN public_item pi ON pf.cmn_facility_no = pi.cmn_facility_no
WHERE ac.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}
ORDER BY f.facility_nm ASC , f.facility_no DESC
/* IFacilityInfoMapper.selectSidoList */ SELECT DISTINCT ac.sido_nm FROM apt_complex ac WHERE ac.sido_nm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ac.sido_nm ASC
/* IFacilityInfoMapper.selectSigunguList */ SELECT DISTINCT ac.sigungu_nm FROM apt_complex ac WHERE ac.sido_nm = #{sidoNm} AND ac.sigungu_nm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ac.sigungu_nm ASC

/* * 시설사항의 시설유형 조회 * → 코드값을 한글명으로 변환 */ SELECT DISTINCT CASE facility_ty_cd WHEN 'ELV' THEN '승강기' WHEN 'WTR' THEN '급수시설' WHEN 'ELC' THEN '전기시설' WHEN 'GAS' THEN '가스시설' WHEN 'FIRE' THEN '소방시설' WHEN 'SEC' THEN '보안시설' WHEN 'ETC' THEN '기타시설' WHEN 'PARK' THEN '입주민주차장' WHEN 'PLAY' THEN '놀이시설' WHEN 'COMM' THEN '커뮤니티룸' WHEN 'GYM' THEN '피트니스센터' WHEN 'STUDY' THEN '작은도서관' WHEN 'PARKING' THEN '방문차량 주차구역' WHEN 'MEET' THEN '회의실' ELSE facility_ty_cd END AS facilityTyNm
FROM facility
WHERE facility_ty_cd IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY facilityTyNm ASC
